summary.en-US: Classic artillery game rebuilt for mobile. 2-player local and online.

description.en-US:
Tank Wars Mobile is a faithful recreation of the classic DOS artillery game
Tank Wars 3.2 (1992) by Kenneth Morse, rebuilt from the ground up for mobile
touchscreens.

Two players take turns aiming their tanks and firing an arsenal of weapons at
each other across randomly generated destructible terrain. Judge the angle,
power, and wind to land your shots — there's no trajectory preview, so every
shot is a test of skill and intuition.

16 weapons including nukes, MIRVs, lasers, and chain reaction inducers.
3 defense systems: shields, inertia dampeners, and repulsers.
6 wall types, 5 wind levels, destructible terrain with crumbling.
Local 2-player hot-seat and online multiplayer via Firebase.

Free and open source. No ads. No tracking. No in-app purchases.
